review: Excellent stay! The staff was very attentive and the room was spotless.
Check-in took too long. Room was okay but service could be better.
Perfect for business travel. Fast WiFi and great breakfast.
Disappointing. Room wasn't ready and bathroom had issues.
Good value for money. Clean rooms and friendly staff.
Beautiful anniversary celebration! Romantic dinner was amazing.
Room smaller than expected. WiFi issues but gym was great.
Heritage architecture is stunning. Minor elevator issues.
Worst experience. Lost luggage and room smelled of smoke.
Luxury at its finest! Butler service was impeccable.
Consistent quality. Always reliable for business stays.
Good but expensive. Pool and location are highlights.
Hidden gem! Attention to detail is remarkable.
Family friendly. Kids club was great. More kids menu options needed.
Not worth premium price. Slow room service and valet scratched car.
